bll=bhy(bhw,blk(bl[7](bhh,blj+1,blh))) bhj=blg+bll-1 for blm=1,bll do bhq[blg+blm-1]=bhw[blm] end bhr=bli local bln=bhn[bhi] bhi=bhi-1 bhv=bln or 0 else local blo,blp=bhf[bha],bhf[bhd] local blq=bgm[blp] local blr={} for bls=1,#blq do blr[bls]=bgl[blq[bls]] end bhq[blo]=blr end end else if bie>=99 then if bie>=bl[2][14][3] then local blt=bhf[bha] local blu=bhf[bhd] local blv=bhr local blw=blu local blx=blv-blw+1 local bly=bhh[blx] bly(bl[7](bhh,blx+1,blv)) bhr=blx-1 else bhp=-bhp end else if bie>=bl[2][1] then bhq[bgi[bho][bha]]=bhq[bgi[bho][bhd]];else bhq[bhf[bha]]=bl[8](bhq[bhf[bhd]],bhq[bhf[bhc]]);end end end end end else if bie>=83 then if bie<=87 then if bie>=86 then if bie<=86 then local blz=bhf[bha];bhq[blz]=bhq[blz]();else local bma=bhf[bha] do bhq[bhf[bha][bmi]]=bhq[bhf[bhd][bmi]]..bhq[bhf[bhc][bmi]];end else if bie>=84 then bhq[bhf[bha]]=bhq[bhf[bhd]]/bhq[bhf[bhc]];else local bmj=bhf[bha] local bmk=bhh[bhr] local bml=bhh[bhr-1] bie>=77 then if bie>=78 then bhq[bhf[bha]][bhq[bhf[bhd]]]=bhf[bhc];else local bmt,bmu=bhf[bha],bhf[bhd] local bmv=bgk[bmu] local bmw=bmv[12905][1] local bmx=bmw[2] local bmy=bmw[3] local bmz=bl[14](1) if bmw[1]==1 then bmz[1]=bhq[bmx] else local bna=bge[bmx] if bmy==0 and bna~=nil and bna[2]~=nil then local bnb=bna[3] local bnc=bna[2] local bnd=bna[1] if(bnd==0 or bnd==1) and bnb~=nil then bna=bnc[bnb] else bna=bnd[bnc] end end bmz[1]=bna end bhq[bmt]=bl[128](bmv,bmz,bgf) end else if bie>=76 then local bne=bhf[bha] local bnf=bhq[bne]+bhq[bne+bl[2][2][8]] bhq[bne]=bnf if bnf<=bhq[bne+1] then bhq[bhf[bhc]],bho=bnf,bhf[bhd] end else local bng=bhf[bha];local bnh=bhq[bng];local bni=bhq[bng+bl[2][2][8]];bhq[bng]=bnh-bni;bho=bhf[bhd];end end else if bie>=81 then if bie>=82 then local bhq[bnm]=bl[128](bnu,nil,bgf) else bhq[bhf[bha]]=bhe;end end end end end else if bie>=37 then if bie>=49 then if bie>=bl[2][10][6] then if bie>=bl[2][31][5] then if bie<=70 then if bie>=69 then if do bhq[boc+boh-1]=bhw[boh] end end else if bie<=bl[2][10][2] then if bie<=bl[2][31][5] then local boi=bhf[bha] local boj=bhr local bok=bhv local bol=bok+1 local bom=bhh[bol] do local bhq[bhf[bha]]=bhq[bhf[bhd]]==bhq[bhf[bhc]];else if bie>=172 then local bwl=bhl local bwm=bhf[bhd] local bwn=bhq[bwl] if not bwn then bho=bwm;end;else bhl=bgi[bho+1][bha] then if bie<=186 then bl[20]=bhf[bhb] local bwr=bl[30](bl[19]) local bws=bl[30](bl[19]) local bwt=bl[30](bl[19]) bhq[bwr][bhq[bws]]=bhq[bwt];else bl[20]=bhf[bhb] local bwu=bl[30](bl[19]) local bwv=bl[30](bl[19]) local bww=bwv bhq[bwu]=bge[bww] end else if bie<=183 then if bie<=182 then if bie>=182 then bhl=bgl[bgi[bho+1][bhd]] bhq[bhf[bha]]=bhq[bhf[bhd]][bhq[bhf[bhc]]];else bho=bhl;end else bhq[bhf[bha]]=bhq[(bhf[bhd]+bhf[bhb])][bhq[bhf[bhc]]];end else if bie<=184 then bhl=bgi[bho+bl[2][2][8]][bhd] bhq[bhf[bha]]=bhq[bhf[bhd]];else bho=bhl;end end end end end else if bie<=207 then if bie<=199 then if bie<=195 then if bie<=193 then bl[20]=bhf[bhb] local bwx=bl[30](bl[19]) local bwy=bl[30](bl[19]) local bwz=bl[30](bl[19]) bhq[bwx]=bhq[bwy][bhq[bwz]];else if bie>=195 then bl[20]=bhf[bhb] local bxa=bl[30](bl[19]) local bxb=bl[30](bl[19]) local bxc=bl[30](bl[19]) bhq[bxa][bhq[bxb]]=bhq[bxc];else local bxd=bhf[bha] bhp=not bhp bhq[bxd[2]]=bhp end end else if bie>=198 then if bie<=198 then local bxe=bgi[bho+1] local bxf=bgi[bho+bl[2][2][8]] local bxg=bgi[bho+bl[2][30][6]] local bxh=bl[8](bxe[bhd],bho+101) local bxi=bl[8](bxf[bhd],bxh) bhq[bhf[bha]]=bgl[bhf[bhd]];bhp=bhq[bxe[bha]] bhp=bhp*bhq[bxi] bhq[bxg[bha]]=bhp bho=bho+bl[2][30][6] else bl[20]=bhf[bhb] local bxj=bl[30](bl[19]) local bxk=bl[30](bl[19]) local bxl=bl[30](bl[19]) bhq[bxj][bhq[bxk]]=bhq[bxl];end else if bie<=196 then local bxm=bgi[bho+1] local bxn=bgi[bho+bl[2][2][8]] bhp=bhq[bhf[bha]] bhp=not bhp bhq[bxn[bha]]=bhp bho=bho+bl[2][2][8] else bl[20]=bhf[bhb] local bxo=bl[30](bl[19]) local bxp=bl[30](bl[19]) local bxq=bl[30](bl[19]) bhq[bxo][bhq[bxp]]=bhq[bxq];end end end else if bie>=204 then if bie>=206 then if bie<=206 then local bxr=bgi[bho+1] local bxs=bl[8](bhf[bhd],bho+46) local bxt=bl[8](bxr[bhd],bxs) bhq[bhf[bha]]=bhq[bhf[bhd]][bhq[bhf[bhc]]];bhq[bxr[bha]]=bhq[bxt];bho=bho+1 else local bxu=bgi[bho+1] bhq[bhf[bha]]=bhq[bhf[bhd]][bhq[bhf[bhc]]];bhq[bxu[bha]][bhq[bxu[bhd]]]=bhq[bxu[bhc]];bho=bho+1 end else if bie<=204 then local bxv=bgi[bho+1] local bxw=bgi[bho+bl[2][2][8]] local bxx=bgi[bho+bl[2][30][6]] local bxy=bl[8](bxw[bhd],bho+76) local bxz=bl[8](bxx[bhd],bxy) bhq[bhf[bha]]=bhq[bhf[bhd]][bhq[bhf[bhc]]];bhq[bxv[bha]]=bgl[bxv[bhd]];bhq[bxw[bha]]=bhq[bxw[bhd]]<bhq[bxw[bhc]];bhq[bxx[bha]]=bhq[bxz];bho=bho+bl[2][30][6] else local bya=bhf[bha] local byb=bhf[bhd] local byc=bhf[bhc] local byd=bl[8](byb[1],bho+81) local bye=bl[8](byb[2],byd) bhq[bya[1]]=bhq[byb[1]][bhq[byc[1]]];bhq[bya[2]]=bhq[bye];end end else if bie<=201 then if bie<=200 then local byf=bhf[bha] local byg=bhf[bhd] local byh=bl[8](byg[1],bho+250) local byi=bl[8](byg[2],byh) bhp=bhq[byf[1]] bhp=bhp*bhq[byi] bhq[byf[3]]=bhp else local byj=bhf[bha] local byk=bhf[bhd] local byl=bhf[bhc] local bym=bl[8](byk[1],bho+90) local byn=bl[8](byk[2],bym) bhq[byj[1]]=bhq[byk[1]][bhq[byl[1]]];bhq[byj[2]]=bhq[byn];end else if bie>=203 then local byo=bgi[bho+1] bhq[bhf[bha]]=bhq[bhf[bhd]][bhq[bhf[bhc]]];bhq[byo[bha]][bhq[byo[bhd]]]=bhq[byo[bhc]];bho=bho+1 else local byp=bhf[bha] local byq=bhf[bhd] local byr=bl[8](byq[1],bho+90) local bys=bl[8](byq[2],byr) bhp=bhq[byp[1]] bhp=bhp*bhq[bys] bhq[byp[3]]=bhp end end end end else if bie>=219 then if bie<=221 then if bie>=221 then bl[20]=bhf[bhb] local byt=bl[30](bl[19]) local byu=bl[30](bl[19]) local byv=byu bhq[byt]=bge[byv] else bl[20]=bhf[bhb] local byw=bl[30](bl[19]) local byx=bl[30](bl[19]) local byy=bl[30](bl[19]) bhq[byw]=bhq[byx][bhq[byy]];end else if bie>=224 then bl[20]=bhf[bhb] local byz=bl[30](bl[19]) local bza=bl[30](bl[19]) local bzb=bl[30](bl[19]) bhq[byz][bhq[bza]]=bhq[bzb];else if bie>=223 then bl[20]=bhf[bhb] local bzc=bl[30](bl[19]) local bzd=bl[30](bl[19]) local bze=bl[30](bl[19]) bhq[bzc]=bhq[bzd][bhq[bze]];else local bzf=bhf[bha] local bzg=bhf[bhd] local bzh=bhf[bhc] bhq[bzf[1]]=bhq[bzg[1]][bhq[bzh[1]]];bhq[bzf[2]][bhq[bzg[2]]]=bhq[bzh[2]];end end end else if bie<=208 then bl[20]=bhf[bhb] local bzi=bl[30](bl[19]) local bzj=bl[30](bl[19]) local bzk=bzj bge[bzk][1]=bhq[bzi] else bl[20]=bhf[bhb] local bzl=bl[30](bl[19]) local bzm=bl[30](bl[19]) local bzn=bl[30](bl[19]) bhq[bzl][bhq[bzm]]=bhq[bzn];end end end end else if bie<=261 then if bie>=244 then if bie<=252 then if bie<=248 then if bie<=246 then if bie>=246 then local bzo=bhf[bha] local bzp=bgl[bhf[bhb]] local bzq=bhq[bzo] bhq[bzo]=bzq[bzp](bzq,bl[7](bhq,bzo+bl[2][2][8],bhj)) else if bie<=244 then local bzr=bhf[bha] local bzs=bhh[bhr] local bzt=bhh[bhr-1] bhr=bhr-bl[2][2][8] local bzu=bhy(bhw,bzt(bzs)) bhj=bzr+bzu-1 for bzv=1,bzu do bhq[bzr+bzv-1]=bhw[bzv] end else local bzw=bhf[bhd] local bzx=bhf[bhc] local bzy=bhq[bzw] local bzz=bhq[bzx] bzy(bzz) end end else if bie<=247 then do for caa=bhg,1,-1 do local cab=bid[caa] local cac=bhk[cab] if cac then local cad=cac[1] if cad==0 then if cac[2]==bhq then cac[1]=1 cac[2]={cac[2][cac[3]]} cac[3]=1 end else if cad==bhq then cac[1]={cac[1][cac[2]]} cac[2]=1 end end end bhk[cab]=nil bid[caa]=nil end bhg=0 local cae=bhh[bhr] bhr=bhr-1 return cae() end else local caf=bhf local cag=caf[bha][1] local cah,cai,caj=bhq[cag],bhq[cag+1],bhq[cag+bl[2][2][8]] bhq[cag]=k(function() for cak,cal in cah,cai,caj do j(true,cak,cal) end end) bhj=cag+bl[2][2][8] while true do local cam,can,cao=bhq[cag]() if not cam then break end do local cap,caq=can,cao bhq[cag+bl[2][30][6]]=cap bhq[cag+bl[2][31][6]]=caq end bhq[caf[bha][2]]=bhq[caf[bhd][2]] local car,cas=bhq[caf[bhd][3]],caf[bha][3];bhq[cas+1]=car;bhq[cas]=car[bgl[caf[bhc][3]]] bhp=bhq[caf[bha][4]] bhr=bhr+1 bhh[bhr]=bhp bhp=bhq[caf[bha][6]] bhr=bhr+1 bhh[bhr]=bhp local cat=caf[bha][8] local cau=bhh[bhr] local cav=bhh[bhr-1] bhr=bhr-bl[2][2][8] cav(cau) end bho=caf[bhd][1] end end else if bie<=250 then if bie>=250 then local caw=bhf local cax=caw[bha][1] local cay=caw[bhc][1] local caz,cba,cbb=bhq[cax],bhq[cax+1],bhq[cax+bl[2][2][8]] local cbc,cbd local cbe,cbf local cbg,cbh local cbi,cbj while caz<=cba do bhq[cax]=caz bhq[cax+bl[2][30][6]]=caz bhq[caw[bha][2]]=bhq[caw[bhd][2]] local cbk,cbl=bhq[caw[bhd][3]],caw[bha][3];bhq[cbl+1]=cbk;bhq[cbl]=cbk[bgl[caw[bhc][3]]] bhp=bhq[caw[bha][4]] bhr=bhr+1 bhh[bhr]=bhp bhp=bhq[caw[bha][6]] bhr=bhr+1 bhh[bhr]=bhp local cbm bhh[bhr]=bhp bhp=bhq[caw[bha][15]] bhr=bhr+1 bhh[bhr]=bhp bhq[caw[bha][17]]={} if not cbd then cbc=bgl[caw[bhd][18]] cbd=true end bhq[caw[bha][18]]=cbc bhq[caw[bha][19]][bhq[caw[bhd][19]]]=bhq[caw[bhc][19]] if not cbf then cbe=bgl[caw[bhd][20]] cbf=true end bhq[caw[bha][20]]=cbe bhq[caw[bha][21]]={} bhq[caw[bha][22]][bhq[caw[bhd][22]]]=bhq[caw[bhc][22]] if not cbh then cbg=bgl[caw[bhd][23]] cbh=true end bhq[caw[bha][23]]=cbg bhq[caw[bha][24]]=bhq[caw[bhd][24]][bhq[caw[bhc][24]]] bho=caw[bhd][1] else local cbx=bhf local cby=cbx[bha][1] local cbz=cbx[bhc][1] local cca,ccb,ccc=bhq[cby],bhq[cby+1],bhq[cby+bl[2][2][8]] local ccd,cce while cca<=ccb do bhq[cby]=cca bhq[cby+bl[2][30][6]]=cca bhq[cbx[bha][2]]=bgf[bgl[cbx[bhd][2]]] bhr=bhr+1 bhh[bhr]=bhq[cbx[bha][3]] bhq[cbx[bha][4]]=bhq[cbx[bhd][4]] bhr=bhr+1 bhh[bhr]=bhq[cbx[bha][5]] local ccf=cbx[bha][6] local ccg=bhh[bhr] local cch=bhh[bhr-1] bhr=bhr-bl[2][2][8] cch(ccg) bhq[cbx[bha][7]]=bgf[bgl[cbx[bhd][7]]] if not cce then ccd=bgl[cbx[bhd][8]] cce=true end bhq[cbx[bha][8]]=ccd ccl=bhh[bhr-1] bhr=bhr-bl[2][2][8] ccl(cck) cca=cca+ccc end bhq[cby]=cca bho=cbx[bhd][1] end else if bie>=252 then local ccm=bhf local ccn=ccm[bha][1] local cco=ccm[bhc][1] local bho=ccm[bhd][1] else local cdm=bhf local cdn=cdm[bha][1] local cdo=cdm[bhc][1] local cdp,cdq,cdr=bhq[cdn],bhq[cdn+1],bhq[cdn+bl[2][2][8]] local cds,cdt local cdu,cdv local cdw,cdx local cdy,cdz while cdp<=cdq do bhq[cdn]=cdp bhq[cdn+bl[2][30][6]]=cdp bhq[cdm[bha][2]]=bhq[cdm[bhd][2]] local cea,ceb=bhq[cdm[bhd][3]],cdm[bha][3];bhq[ceb+1]=cea;bhq[ceb]=cea[bgl[cdm[bhc][3]]] bhp=bhq[cdm[bha][4]] ceg=bhh[bhr-bl[2][2][8]] bhr=bhr-bl[2][30][6] bhq[ced]=ceg(cef,cee) bhq[cdm[bha][9]]=bhq[cdm[bhd][9]] local ceh,cei=bhq[cdm[bhd][10]],cdm[bha][10];bhq[cei+1]=ceh;bhq[cei]=ceh[bgl[cdm[bhc][10]]] cdt=true end bhq[cdm[bha][18]]=cds bhq[cdm[bha][19]][bhq[cdm[bhd][19]]]=bhq[cdm[bhc][19]] if not cdv then cdu=bgl[cdm[bhd][20]] cdv=true end bhq[cdm[bha][20]]=cdu bhq[cdm[bha][21]]={} bhq[cdm[bha][22]][bhq[cdm[bhd][22]]]=bhq[cdm[bhc][22]] if not cdx then cdw=bgl[cdm[bhd][23]] cdx=true end bhq[cdm[bha][23]]=cdw bhq[cdm[bha][24]]=bhq[cdm[bhd][24]][bhq[cdm[bhc][24]]] bho=cdm[bhd][1] end end end else if bie>=258 then if bie<=259 then if bie>=259 then if bhf[bha]~=113 then local cen=bgi[bhq[bhf[bhc]]] local ceo,cep=cen[bhd],cen[bha] cen[bha]=ceo cen[bhd]=cep bhf[bha]=113 end else if bhf[bha]~=249 then local ceq=bgi[bhq[bhf[bhb]]] local cer,ces,cet=ceq[bhc],ceq[bha],ceq[bhd] ceq[bha]=cer ceq[bhd]=ces ceq[bhc]=cet bhf[bha]=249 end end else if bie<=260 then if bhf[bha]~=6 then local ceu=bgi[bhq[bhf[bhc]]] local cev,cew=ceu[bhd],ceu[bha] ceu[bha]=cev ceu[bhd]=cew bhf[bha]=6 end else if bhf[bha]~=bl[2][18][4] then local cex=bgi[bhq[bhf[bhb]]] local cey,cez,cfa=cex[bhd],cex[bhc],cex[bha] cex[bha]=cey cex[bhd]=cez cex[bhc]=cfa bhf[bha]=bl[2][18][4] end end end else if bie<=255 then if bie>=255 then local cfb=bgi[bhq[bhf[bhb]]] cfb[bhd]=(bhf[bhd]+21) cfb[bhc]=(bhf[bhc]+bl[2][30][4]) else if bie<=253 then local cfc=bhf local cfd=cfc[bha][1] local cfe=cfc[bhc][1] local cff,cfg,cfh=bhq[cfd],bhq[cfd+1],bhq[cfd+bl[2][2][8]] local cfi,cfj local cfk,cfl local cfm,cfn local cfo,cfp while cff<=cfg do bhq[cfd]=cff bhq[cfd+bl[2][30][6]]=cff bhq[cfc[bha][2]]=bhq[cfc[bhd][2]] local cfq,cfr=bhq[cfc[bhd][3]],cfc[bha][3];bhq[cfr+1]=cfq;bhq[cfr]=cfq[bgl[cfc[bhc][3]]] bhr=bhr+1 bhh[bhr]=bhq[cfc[bha][4]] bhr=bhr+1 bhh[bhr]=bhq[cfc[bha][5]] bhq[cfc[bha][6]]=bgl[cfc[bhd][6]] bhp=bhq[cfc[bha][7]] bhr=bhr+1 bhh[bhr]=bhp local cfs=cfc[bha][9] local cft=bhh[bhr] local cfu=bhh[bhr-1] local cfv=bhh[bhr-bl[2][2][8]] bhr=bhr-bl[2][30][6] bhq[cfs]=cfv(cfu,cft) eds<=163420 then if eds==163420 then edy=n(edx/bl[2][2][8]) if(edx%bl[2][2][8])==0 then edv[37],eds=8359,edt[323292] or edu(1159,323292,2839) else edv[37],eds=3678,edt[939319] or edu(1800,939319,518) edf==56861 then edn=nil edi[27],edf=15430,edg[264655] or edh(3513,264655,2719) elseif edf==263861 then edl=function() local eep,eeq,eer,ees,eet,eeu eeq={} ees={} eer=function(eev,eew,eex) local efb=efc[3] or efd(3) else efb=2657 break end end end end end;bh=bi[243] or bj(243) elseif bh==1734 then bl[4]=table and table.move or function(efo,efp,efq,efr,efs) local eft,efu,efv,efw,efx,efy,efz,ega efu={} efw={4494,3675,2877,2049,1239,4531,3721,2902,2092,1258,4544,3737,2900,2096,1256} efv=function(egb) local egc=efw[egb] local egd=(egb*816)%4096 local bh==1728 then eia%(eif+2)==0 then eib=eic[9] or eid(9) else eib=eic[17] or eid(17) end elseif eib==2366 then break else eib=2366 break end else if eib>2376 then if eib>2381 then if eib==2386 then if eia%2==0 or end),string.len,table.remove,table.sort,(string.unpack),string.gmatch,string.find,string.reverse,tostring,math.abs,rawget,string.format,...);
